LDAP_BIND_DN.description: DN to use when binding to LDAP server

LDAP_USER_BASE.description: Base DN for user searches (e.g., ou=users,dc=example,dc=com)

LDAP_USERNAME_ATTR.description: LDAP attribute to use as Django username

LDAP_FIRSTNAME_ATTR.description: LDAP attribute for user's first name

LDAP_LASTNAME_ATTR.description: LDAP attribute for user's last name

LDAP_EMAIL_ATTR.description: LDAP attribute for user's email address

LDAP_CREATE_SUPERUSER.description: Automatically create superuser account for LDAP users
